prestazioni: AMG M178 DE 4.0L V8 Biturbo (4304cc) – Full Weistec W.4 Stage 3+ engine build with forged internals (Mahle Motorsport pistons, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, billet crankshaft), upgraded valve springs, titanium retainers, and ported cylinder heads with oversized intake/exhaust valves. Paired with Weistec’s hybrid turbocharger upgrade (Garrett GTX4286R turbos with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducers, and custom 3.5" V-band downpipes) for 850+ HP on 93 octane with a 2.5-bar boost target.

Bespoke ECU calibration by HP Tuners (Mercedes-Benz TCU integration) with custom torque modeling for the AMG SPEEDSHIFT DCT 7G transmission, including upgraded clutch packs (Sachs Performance Stage 3 clutches with carbon friction discs) and a PWR Racing transmission cooler with dual 10AN lines to prevent heat soak during track use.

Full KW Suspension Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilover kit (24-way rebound, 16-way compression, adjustable top mounts) with custom valving for the AMG GT’s aluminum double-wishbone front and multi-link rear suspension. Paired with H&R Monoball subframe bushings, SuperPro polyurethane control arm bushings, and a 30mm front sway bar (replacing the OEM 24mm) for reduced body roll and improved turn-in response.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (AMG GT-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a 50mm extended rear diffuser. Includes custom 3D-scanned front splitter with integrated canards and a rear wing (2000mm span) with adjustable Gurney flaps for high-speed stability.

OEM+ AMG Night Package II (gloss black) with custom dechromed accents, including a satin black AMG grille (replacing the chrome slats), blacked-out side mirrors, and a full carbon fiber engine cover (RWB Carbon) with a clear-coated weave finish. Lower bumper mesh inserts replaced with BMC Racing carbon fiber air intakes for improved airflow to the intercoolers.

Forgeline GA3R 20x10.5" (front) and 21x12.5" (rear) forged wheels with a 5x112 PCD, ET40 (front) and ET50 (rear) offsets, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 325/25/21 rear). Brake system upgraded to AP Racing CP9660 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers with 405mm (front) and 380mm (rear) two-piece rotors, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads for track endurance.
